'''Fevye'starn''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. 

It was located in the southeastern part of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] eastern continent, facing the [[Rhyde'vak]] [[ocean/Legends|ocean]]. [[Sal Vhe'starn]] was located to the west of the city.

{{City-stub}}
